models.tool: A utility tool available in the teaching tools hub. Each tool belongs to a category and has its own dedicated interface.
models.category: A grouping label for organizing tools in the grid (e.g., Teaching & Classroom, File Converters).
models.favorite: A user's pinned tool that appears in the Favorites row at the top of the grid.

relationships: Favorite belongs to User and Tool

tools.name: Random Student Picker
tools.description: Select a random student from a group with a fun spin wheel or shuffle animation

tools.name: Countdown Timer
tools.description: Set countdown timers and stopwatches for classroom activities and exams

tools.name: Noise Level Monitor
tools.description: Visual noise meter using the microphone — keeps the classroom volume in check

tools.name: Task Organizer
tools.description: Create and manage task checklists for lessons, assignments, or personal to-dos

tools.name: PDF Converter
tools.description: Convert PDF files to Word documents and Word files to PDF instantly

tools.name: Image Format Converter
tools.description: Convert images between PNG, JPG, and WebP formats with quality control

tools.name: CSV / JSON Converter
tools.description: Transform CSV spreadsheets to JSON and back — useful for data imports and exports

tools.name: Video Downloader
tools.description: Paste a YouTube URL, choose quality, and download the video for offline classroom use

tools.name: Image Compressor
tools.description: Reduce image file size and resize dimensions without losing visible quality

tools.name: QR Code Generator
tools.description: Generate QR codes from any text or URL — perfect for sharing links with students

tools.name: Screenshot to Text
tools.description: Upload a screenshot or image and extract the text using OCR — great for digitizing printed materials

tools.name: Quick Notes
tools.description: A simple scratchpad for jotting down ideas, reminders, or class notes on the fly

tools.name: Scientific Calculator
tools.description: Full-featured scientific calculator with trigonometry, logarithms, and expression history

tools.name: Text Diff Comparator
tools.description: Paste two texts side by side and highlight the differences — useful for comparing student submissions or document versions

tools.name: Password Generator
tools.description: Generate strong random passwords with customizable length and character options
